module.name: compare
module.description: Layout to compare two elements (e.g., Plan A vs Plan B) side by side.

snippet.label: Compare Board
snippet.text: <!-- @compare left_title: Plan A, right_title: Plan B --> Low cost but takes time. <!-- @ --> High initial cost but highly efficient in the long run. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Compares two elements with a VS badge in the center.
